heading: Map a Domain to Your Identity Provider
body:
Upload an HTML (Hypertext Markup Language) file containing a verification key to verify
that you own your domain.

- Click HTML File Upload.

- Click Next.

- Download the `mongodb-site-verification.html` file
  that Atlas provides.

- Upload the HTML (Hypertext Markup Language) file to a web site on your domain. You
  must be able to access the file at
  `<https://host.domain>/mongodb-site-verification.html`.

- Click Finish.
